title: 版本依赖
author: hq-zh
body:
pnpm   i   
 WARN  5 deprecated subdependencies found: fstream@1.0.12, glob@7.2.3, inflight@1.0.6, rimraf@2.7.1


 pnpm why fstream@1.0.12   
dependencies:
exceljs 4.4.0
└─┬ unzipper 0.10.14
  └── fstream 1.0.12

pnpm why glob@7.2.3    
dependencies:
exceljs 4.4.0
├─┬ archiver 5.3.2
│ ├─┬ archiver-utils 2.1.0
│ │ └── glob 7.2.3
│ └─┬ zip-stream 4.1.1
│   └─┬ archiver-utils 3.0.4
│     └── glob 7.2.3
└─┬ unzipper 0.10.14
  └─┬ fstream 1.0.12
    └─┬ rimraf 2.7.1
      └── glob 7.2.3

 pnpm why inflight@1.0.6
dependencies:
exceljs 4.4.0
├─┬ archiver 5.3.2
│ ├─┬ archiver-utils 2.1.0
│ │ └─┬ glob 7.2.3
│ │   └── inflight 1.0.6
│ └─┬ zip-stream 4.1.1
│   └─┬ archiver-utils 3.0.4
│     └─┬ glob 7.2.3
│       └── inflight 1.0.6
└─┬ unzipper 0.10.14
  └─┬ fstream 1.0.12
    └─┬ rimraf 2.7.1
      └─┬ glob 7.2.3
        └── inflight 1.0.6


 pnpm why rimraf@2.7.1     
dependencies:
exceljs 4.4.0
└─┬ unzipper 0.10.14
  └─┬ fstream 1.0.12
    └── rimraf 2.7.1
